description: Style Note This kurta by diva is designed to accentuate your femininity, combining traditional prints with a modern silhouette. Look stylish in this ethnic kurti and revel in the comfort of the soft fabric. Pair it with leggings and heels for a formal look or wear it with denims and flats for an off-duty look. Product Details Blue and black printed kurta that has a plunging v-neckline, three quarter sleeves with blue tipping, mock placket with sequins and split side seams Material and care Blended fabric Dry clean only Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size S
